name: ReviewModerationEngine

neutralConcepts: Exactly 3 paths: PASS → ReviewPublished, REJECT → ReviewRejected, UNCERTAIN → ReviewFlaggedForHuman
UNCERTAIN maps to status=PENDING — never to status=REJECTED
Thresholds from FREEDOM config: flow10_moderation_pass_threshold and flow10_moderation_reject_threshold
DPO conflict: conflictsWith FLOW-08-binary-moderation (confidence < threshold → REJECT)
SETNX deduplication on moderation key before AI call

ironRules.rule: Exactly 3 moderation outcomes: PASS → ReviewPublished, REJECT → ReviewRejected, UNCERTAIN → ReviewFlaggedForHuman(status=PENDING).
UNCERTAIN MUST map to PENDING status — never to REJECTED status. A PENDING review can still be published after human decision.
Both thresholds (pass_threshold, reject_threshold) MUST be read from FREEDOM config at runtime — not hardcoded.
DNA-8: storeDocument(moderation record) BEFORE enqueue() on all three paths.

keywords: three path moderation PASS REJECT UNCERTAIN PENDING human queue FREEDOM config threshold binary collapse
